nasb.text: Then he made the table of acacia wood, two cubits long and a cubit wide and one and a half cubits high.

esv.text: He also made the table of acacia wood. Two cubits was its length, a cubit its breadth, and a cubit and a half its height.

cnv.text: 他又用皂莢木做了一張桌子，長八十八公分，寬四十四公分，高六十六公分。

ccb.text: 他用皂荚木造了一张桌子，长八十八厘米，宽四十四厘米，高六十六厘米。
